mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, password_hash AS passwordHash, introduction, avatar_image_url AS avatarImageUrl, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( name, email, password_hash, introduction, avatar_image_url ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{introduction}, #{avatarImageUrl} )
